Eating watermelon seeds is harmless. The seeds are edible and nutritious, but they pass through your digestive system largely intact (they’re a good source of protein, healthy fats, and minerals). In normal amounts they cause no ill effects; very large quantities might cause a mild stomach upset or a brief bout of constipation, but they don’t sprout in your stomach.
